(d) Arun's grandfather's son can be Arun's father or Arun's uncle. Therefore, we have to draw the two diagrams, as follows

Arun's grandfather ⊖ → Arun's grandfather ⊖
Son ↓ → Son ↓
Arun's father ⊖ Or Arun's father Brother → Arun's uncle ⊖
Son ↓ → Son ↓ Daughter ↓
Arun ⊖ → Girl ⊖ → Arun ⊖ Girl ⊖
Sister ↓ → Girl is Arun's cousin
Girl is Arun's sister

Clearly, the above diagrams make it clear that girl is either sister or cousin of Arun. Here, no definite relation can be established between Arun and girl on the basis of given information. Hence, the data is inadequate to answer the question.

(d) Let us draw the family diagram

Ram Brother → Ram's brother ⊖ ↑ Mother-in-law of Ram's nephew
↓ Son ↓ Mother
Ram's nephew ⊖ Married couple Sister → Ram's nephew's sister-in-law

Hence, it is clear that the lady in the photograph is mother-in-law of Ram's nephew.
